name: Chicken Stock
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds chicken backs, wings, necks, bones (any combination)
recipeInstructions: If using wings, cut each wing at the joint into 3 pieces. Place chicken parts in a stockpot or kettle with 14 cups cold water. Heat to boiling and skim froth. Add 1 cup cold water and return to boil. Reduce heat to maintain a simmer and add onions with cloves stuck together, garlic, celery, carrots, salt, parsley, peppercorns, thyme, and bay leaf. Simmer, skimming froth as needed, for 3 hours. Strain stock through a fine sieve into a bowl and cool to warm. For a more concentrated flavor, simmer uncovered until desired concentration is reached. Refrigerate and remove fat. Makes about 10 cups.
